svg.text: Each data field: whether it is stored on-device and/or transmitted to the SaaS
Opaque UUID per Claude Code session
Absolute path of active project root
e.g. Bash, Read, Edit, Write, Agent
File reads, bash output — never logged
Byte length of result only — not content
Subagent type string from hook input
Per-tool call count map from transcript
Content of files read by tools — never logged
Code changes and commit text — never logged
No name, email, or PII exposed to hooks
Machine info not accessible via hook API
Not accessible via Claude Code hook API
Disabled by default — explicit config required
Transmission requires api_key set via /telemetry-connect. Disable all collection: set "enabled": false in ~/.claude/telemetry/config.json.
